changes: ADDED: Caffeine Toggle — systemd-inhibit prevents suspend, indicator in TopBar
ADDED: Night Light — wlsunset blue light filter (3500K), auto-installs if missing, TopBar toggle
ADDED: Do Not Disturb — suppress all QuickShell notifications, TopBar indicator
ADDED: Power Profile Switcher — cycle balanced/performance/power-saver via powerprofilesctl, TopBar toggle
ADDED: Gaming Mode — one-click disables compositor effects, sets performance governor, enables DND + Caffeine
ADDED: VPN Quick Manager — toggle first WireGuard VPN via NetworkManager, TopBar indicator
ADDED: Quick Notes — floating text popup saves to ~/Notes.md (Super+Shift+N, TopBar button)
ADDED: System Monitor — live CPU/RAM/disk bars with 2s polling (Super+Shift+M, TopBar button)
ADDED: Workspace Overview — visual grid of all workspaces with window lists, click to switch (Super+Shift+W)
ADDED: Theme Profiles — save/restore wallpaper + toggle states via theme_profiles.sh
ENHANCED: TopBar now has 6 new toggle buttons (right) and 2 new utility buttons (left)
ENHANCED: All new features exposed via Super+Shift+ keybinds
FIXED: Website/dotfiles audit — 8 misinformation/inconsistency issues resolved across both repos
FIXED: updates.json latest_version was stuck at 1.7.28 — users missed 8 critical releases (quoting crash, scale fix, settings_watcher)
FIXED: Website changelog was 8 versions behind — stopped at v1.7.42, now complete through v1.7.51
FIXED: install-dots.html and faq.html said settings.json is 'never touched' — false since v1.7.48. Now correctly documents updated-every-release policy with backup safety net
FIXED: install.sh header comment used old broken double-quote one-liner syntax
FIXED: home.html showed fake '3.8k stars' badge — replaced with dynamic shields.io badge
FIXED: All website 'Last updated' dates refreshed to 2026-05-18

CRITICAL FIX: hyprctl reload does NOT apply monitor scale changes — settings_watcher now runs hyprctl keyword monitor for each monitor from settings.json after reload, forcing the correct scale to take effect immediately
CRITICAL FIX: Fixes the 'everything oversized' bug (Chrome, kitty, fonts, notifications too big after update)
CRITICAL FIX: install.sh now also calls settings_watcher.sh --compile after scripts deploy to regenerate monitors.conf
CRITICAL FIX: GuidePopup.qml update buttons used double quotes for bash -c "$(curl ...)" — install.sh double quotes terminated the string prematurely, crashing the terminal
CRITICAL FIX: Changed to single quotes + eval to prevent quoting crash
CRITICAL FIX: install.sh never called settings_watcher.sh --compile after deploying settings.json — monitors.conf stayed stale, runtime scale stuck at old value
CHANGED: settings.json always overwritten with auto-detected monitor name (backup to /tmp/, validation restores backup if invalid)
ADDED: Auto-detect monitor name on fresh install — reads first connected display from sysfs, injects real name into settings.json instead of hardcoded eDP-1
ADDED: Falls back to default if detection fails or jq is missing
ADDED: Final validation checks JSON is valid before deploying
CHANGED: settings.json was only deployed if not exists — preserving user keybinds, startup apps, and monitor config
NOTE: Reverted in v1.7.49 — settings.json now overwritten every time to push monitor/scaling fixes to all users
FIXED: audio_autoswitch.sh reacted to EVERY pactl event — including user-initiated default-sink changes
FIXED: USB headset → Bluetooth manual switch was overridden on any subsequent event
CHANGED: Now only reacts to sink 'new' (device plugged) and 'remove' (device unplugged) events
CHANGED: Telemetry prompt moved to beginning of install
FIXED: Opting out of telemetry now also removes old scripts and timers from previous installs
ADDED: Telemetry opt-out prompt before script deployment
ADDED: Matugen version detection (v2 vs v3) — v3 users get a compatibility warning
FIXED: Telemetry was deployed unconditionally without asking user
FIXED: Updating watcher scripts deployed new files but old processes kept running with stale code
ADDED: Step 17 now pgrep-kills then nohup-restarts all watcher scripts after deploying updated files
FIX: Takes effect immediately after running install.sh
FIXED: audio_autoswitch.sh only matched headphone/headset/bluez/bluetooth as external audio sinks
FIXED: USB audio devices (e.g. GeneralPlus USB Audio Device) were ignored — script stayed on built-in audio
ADDED: 'usb' to the external device pattern so USB audio sinks are now detected and auto-switched
ADDED: Amethyst Noir theme — always-on deep purple/indigo palette (noirBg, noirText, noirRed, noirOverlay0, noirSubtext0) across all popups
ADDED: 150% Auto-Boost — drag volume past 100% enables boost (red accent), drag below 100% disables, smooth tabColor interpolation amethyst->noirRed from 100-150%
ADDED: Position-based slider gradient — amethyst at 0-100%, smooth transition to noirRed at 100-150%
ADDED: Continuous bezier wave with Math.sin-based amplitude decay — wave amplitude smoothly reaches 0 at full volume
ADDED: Battery popup profile-based theming — performance=noirRed, balanced=amethyst, power-saver=noirOverlay0
ADDED: Battery orb — removed icon, shows percentage only (charging=󰂄, normal=󱐋)
ADDED: Audio auto-switch — headphones/Bluetooth become default on plug, revert to Built-in on unplug (audio_autoswitch.sh + systemd service)
ADDED: audio_autoswitch.service — systemd user service, auto-starts on login, restarts on failure
CHANGED: TopBar volume pill — noirBg text on peach bg, noirText on red bg, noirRed/noirRedGlow gradient when boosted
CHANGED: audio_wait.sh — timeout 2 fallback so top bar polls every 2s when wpctl changes don't trigger pactl events
FIXED: VolumePopup activeTab — declared as proper property string (was missing, broke tab switching)
REMOVED: Boost toggle button — boost is purely auto via drag threshold (no degrade animation needed)
REMOVED: Battery popup audio volume slider
ADDED: QuickShell Amethyst Noir — hardcoded deep purple/indigo palette, no more wallpaper-based color changes (MatugenColors.qml rewritten)
FIXED: BatteryPopup crash on charger plug/unplug — replaced NumberAnimation driving requestPaint with crash-safe Timer + Date.now()

ADDED: 10 new BatteryPopup visual effects — liquid depth layers, shimmer band, surface foam, floating embers, pulse ripples, ring plasma sweep, audio-reactive turbulence, lava lamp blobs, charging bubbles, click ripple
ADDED: Glow pulse on battery core hover — inner halo brightens smoothly
ADDED: Drag-to-brightness on battery core — drag up/down to adjust screen brightness
ADDED: Click ripple expanding ring on battery core tap
ADDED: Offline detection — if Discord webhook fails, button shows 'Failed - no internet' and keeps your typed message
ADDED: Polished Discord embed with category emojis, severity colors, ANSI system info block, and ISO timestamp
FIXED: Category/Severity chips now use blue highlight when selected (were invisible before)
FIXED: Chip selection now works — properties moved to correct scope so clicks register
FIXED: System info toggle collapse works in nested layouts
CHANGED: report_send.sh now returns curl exit code so QML detects network failures
ADDED: Re-added 'Tip: Type update in your terminal' hint in Guide About section
CHANGED: Lock screen music no longer plays automatically — press the play button in the bottom-left to start
FIXED: Lock screen music now stops when user unlocks (added pkill pw-play fallback in lock.sh)
ADDED: update() command back in .zshrc — type 'update' in terminal to check and install the latest version
FIXED: .zshrc now force-overwritten on every update (removed deploy-once guard) so new functions reach existing users
CRITICAL: Fixed partial git clone silently wiping ~/.config/hypr — added key-file integrity check after clone + pre-wipe safety check for hyprland.conf in source + full backup before wipe
ADDED: Update notification sound — plays update-notification.mp3 when a new version is available
ADDED: Charger plug/unplug sounds — plays charger-plug-sound.mp3 when plugged in, charger-unplug-sound.mp3 when unplugged
CRITICAL: Fixed Hyprland config wipe on update — replaced destructive Syu with safe config restore and settings.json backup
FIXED: Thunar thumbnails not showing — fixed RAW/ODF/EPUB tumbler plugins, auto-clears cache on install/update
FIXED: Battery sounds now play reliably — battery_fetch.sh uses pw-play/paplay + nohup
FIXED: Lock screen (Super+L) password always rejected — quickshell PAM service 'quickshell.service.pam' had no config file, fell through to pam_deny.so
FIXED: Thunar admin:// and polkit privilege escalation not working — polkit-1 PAM config existed in /usr/lib/pam.d/ but was not linked in /etc/pam.d/
ADDED: Installer now creates /etc/pam.d/quickshell.service.pam and symlinks /etc/pam.d/polkit-1 on new installs and updates
CLEANUP: Removed all # THE LOCATIONS.txt files from repo and user machines on update
UPDATED: Wallpapers link in Guide About section now opens wallvault.pages.dev
FIXED: Update checker now follows redirects (curl -sL) — GuidePopup, UpdaterPopup, and update_notifier were silently failing
REMOVED: Terminal update() function from .zshrc — updates now via Guide popup and notification tap only
REMOVED: 'Type update in terminal' tip from Guide popup
FIXED: GuidePopup missing closing brace after removing terminal hint
ADDED: Lock screen audio — music plays on lock via pw-play with playlist management
ADDED: Media controls (prev/play/next) in lock screen for playlist navigation
FIXED: Volume slider now controls only pw-play stream (not system audio)
FIXED: Volume starts at 50% every lock, slider syncs correctly
CLEANUP: Removed stale ilyamiro references — deletes old imperative-dots-version file on update
ADDED: 3% critical countdown + auto-suspend to real-time battery monitor (battery_fetch.sh)
FIXED: Countdown fires on udev events instantly, sound every 3s, suspends at 0
FIXED: Real-time low battery alerts now play sounds alongside notifications (battery_fetch.sh)
ADDED: mpg123 package for lightweight MP3 playback in battery alerts
FIXED: SDDM login wallpaper preserved on reinstall — theme files update but wallpaper (any filename) is never overwritten
FIXED: WiFi/Bluetooth popup not opening — removed faulty character counter
FIXED: Hero Orb volume — smooth drag, no glitching, instant mute text
FIXED: Orb volume sensitivity and muting issues
FIXED: Hero Orb volume control — smooth drag, no glitching, instant mute text
FIXED: Repo cleaned — only 1 default wallpaper, no duplicate images
ADDED: WiFi password field shows character counter in corner
FIXED: Hero Orb volume drag sensitivity reduced for smoother control
ADDED: Hero Orb volume control — drag up/down to adjust volume, tap to mute
ADDED: Low battery warnings at 20%, 10%, and 5% with critical notifications
REBRAND: Project renamed to Eprahemi — new ASCII art banner everywhere
REBRAND: All display names updated from WaveRice to Eprahemi
FIXED: SDDM login wallpaper no longer overwritten on update
UPDATE: All 9 Module preview images replaced with new screenshots
ADDED: Bluetooth support (bluez, bluez-utils) enabled and running
ADDED: Print support (cups, cups-pdf, system-config-printer, sane-airscan) enabled
ADDED: Common drivers (NetworkManager, iwd, firmware, mesa-utils, vulkan-tools)
FIXED: Wallpaper picker no longer slow on first open after reboot
FIXED: Thumbnail cache no longer wiped on every install — only on first install
ADDED: Thumbnails pre-generated during install for all local wallpapers
ADDED: Color markers pre-extracted during install (no lazy delay)
FIXED: Face icon no longer overwritten on update — only set default if user has none
FIXED: Wallpapers no longer overwritten on update — only copy defaults on first install
FIXED: SDDM wallpaper only copied if user's Wallpapers folder is empty
FIXED: Weather .env API key never touched by installer (already safe)
FIXED: Wallpaper path uses actual device username (always dynamic)
FIXED: Avatar now truly circular — clip:true clips to bounding box not rounded shape. Using OpacityMask from QtGraphicalEffects instead
FIXED: Wallpaper now uses real FastBlur (QtGraphicalEffects) instead of pixelation
FIXED: Avatar now circular — added implicitWidth/Height so layout allocates 150x150
FIXED: Added qt5-graphicaleffects to installer (required for FastBlur on Qt5 SDDM)
FIXED: Black TTY on boot — SDDM not installed at all! sddm-qt6 AUR package doesn't exist, yay -S failed silently
FIXED: Install official SDDM from pacman (always works) instead of broken sddm-qt6 AUR
FIXED: Main.qml now works on both Qt5 and Qt6 SDDM (no QtQuick.Effects dependency)
FIXED: Avatar uses clip+radius instead of MultiEffect mask (works on Qt5)
FIXED: Background uses pixelation blur instead of MultiEffect (works on Qt5)
FIXED: All imports versioned (QtQuick 2.15, Controls 2.15, Layouts 1.0)
FIXED: Added qmldir for Colors.qml singleton reliability
FIXED: Colors.qml uses versioned QtQuick import
ADDED: Qt6 packages auto-installed (qt6-base, qt6-declarative, qt6-quickcontrols2, qt6-quicklayouts, qt6-svg, qt6-shadertools, qt6-wayland)
ADDED: SDDM-Qt6 replaces Qt5 SDDM automatically (required for QtQuick.Effects support)
ADDED: Quickshell Q6 auto-installed (UI framework for all panels and widgets)
ADDED: Default Colors.qml for SDDM theme (Catppuccin Mocha, works before Matugen runs)
FIXED: SDDM Main.qml replaced with fully working version (Qt6-native, MultiEffect blur, circular avatar)
FIXED: SDDM Main.qml renamed lowercase -> capital M (SDDM requirement)
FIXED: Imports now work on both Qt5 and Qt6 SDDM (QtQuick 2.15, Controls 2.15, Layouts 1.0)
FIXED: Background blur via pixelation (no MultiEffect/FastBlur dependency)
FIXED: Avatar now circular (Layout.preferredWidth/Height, not width/height)
FIXED: No external Colors.qml dependency (colors embedded in Main.qml)
FIXED: metadata.desktop updated with proper SDDM theme fields
FIXED: SDDM login theme now works on all devices (removed QtQuick.Effects/MultiEffect dependency, embedded Catppuccin Mocha colors directly, compatible with Qt5 SDDM)
FIXED: Guide popup Check for Updates button removed (was spinning with no text), only version display and terminal hint remain
CHANGED: All keybinds replaced with WaveRice defaults (Super+T=terminal, Super+G=Chrome, Super+E=Thunar, Super+F=Spotify, Super+A=Discord, Super+K=Steam, Super+J=Edge, Alt+V=Code, etc.)
ADDED: Thunar file manager, Steam, Microsoft Edge to installer packages
FIXED: Keybinds template is now the source of truth (settings.json keybinds cleared)
FIXED: Guide About section layout completely restructured — cards, version, check button, and tip stacked vertically with proper spacing
FIXED: Update check timeout reduced to 3 seconds (was 5)
FIXED: Check for Updates button now properly centered in a ColumnLayout (was broken Layout properties)
IMPROVED: Version display added above check button
IMPROVED: Divider separates cards from update section
IMPROVED: Spinning animation speed increased (800ms per loop)
FIXED: SDDM theme main.qml now has QML version numbers (fixes 'Library import requires a version' error)
IMPROVED: Installer now skips already-installed apps silently (no 'already installed' messages)
ADDED: F8 keybind for microphone mute (works on HP laptops and any laptop with mic mute button)
ADDED: sof-firmware and alsa-firmware packages for laptop audio support
ADDED: 'update' terminal command — type 'update' to check for new version and install
ADDED: Terminal hint in Guide About section below Check for Updates button
ADDED: Check for Updates button in Guide (Super+H) → About section
ADDED: Button shows 'You have the best updated version!' when up-to-date
ADDED: Button shows 'Update Available vX.X.X' and triggers one-liner install when clicked
CHANGED: Repo renamed to WaveRice (was Arch-Config-Replace)
CHANGED: All URLs, version files, and references updated to WaveRice
CHANGED: Installer header and messages updated
ADDED: SDDM theme matugen-minimal with liquid wave animation on password input
ADDED: SDDM theme auto-installs to /usr/share/sddm/themes/ and configures /etc/sddm.conf.d/
ADDED: Iosevka Nerd Font to package list (needed by SDDM theme icons)
FIXED: Keybindings now unbind old conflicting keys (Ctrl+Enter, Super+T, etc.) before setting new ones
FIXED: Old keybinds from previous configs no longer persist
FIXED: Restored /usr/share/wallpapers/lock.png copy with sudo (fixes Permission denied)
FIXED: Only copies lock.png if it doesn't exist (no error on re-install)
FIXED: restore.sh also copies lock.png with sudo guard
FIXED: Removed /usr/share/wallpapers copy from install.sh (was causing Permission denied error)
FIXED: Removed lock screen wallpaper copy — user only asked to replace lock.png in Wallpapers/ folder
FIXED: Restore.sh no longer copies to /usr/share/wallpapers/lock.png
FIXED: Removed ALL hardcoded /home/eprahemi/ paths — now works for any username
FIXED: settings.json wallpaperDir was hardcoded to eprahemi, now empty (QML falls back to $HOME/Pictures/Wallpapers)
FIXED: env.conf.template shader cache path now uses {{SHADER_CACHE}} placeholder
FIXED: settings_watcher.sh now substitutes {{SHADER_CACHE}} with $HOME/.cache/nvidia
FIXED: .zshrc had hardcoded PATH to /home/eprahemi/.opencode/bin, now uses $HOME
FIXED: install.sh now runs settings_watcher.sh --compile to regenerate configs for current user
ADDED: jq and inotify-tools to package list (needed by settings_watcher)
IMPROVED: All configs auto-regenerate for the correct user on install
FIXED: awww wallpaper setter now installed (awww-git from AUR) — was missing, friend saw Hyprland logo
FIXED: Wallpapers now actually get applied on first install
FIXED: Oh-My-Zsh now installs in install.sh (before .zshrc is copied)
FIXED: .zshrc no longer fails if oh-my-zsh is missing (added guard check)
FIXED: .zshrc now shows git clone errors instead of hiding them
FIXED: Replaced lock.png with Himeno Hot Face.png as default wallpaper
FIXED: Wallpaper picker now clears thumbnail cache on install (no more 'no wallpaper found')
FIXED: Wallpapers now force-overwrite on re-install (cp -n → cp -f)
FIXED: Glob pattern for wallpaper selection now handles spaces in filenames
FIXED: Lock screen wallpaper now copied from any wallpaper in ~/Pictures/Wallpapers/
FIXED: restore.sh updated to match new wallpaper strategy
IMPROVED: Wallpaper picker thumbnail cache reset on each install
FIXED: Timezone now detected with 4 API fallbacks
FIXED: NTP time sync enabled for automatic updates
FIXED: Hardware clock synced to UTC
IMPROVED: Better location detection reliability
IMPROVED: Timezone auto-detection with ipapi.co, ip-api.com, worldtimeapi, ipinfo.io
